meta.title: Vincor — Occlusion & Posture Diagnosis
meta.description: Discover the cause of your jaw, neck, or migraine complaints with a free 4D scan. DIERS 4D Spinescan at Vincor Eindhoven.

hero.title: Discover the
hero.titleAfter: of your jaw, neck, or migraine complaints
hero.subtitle: With the DIERS 4D Spinescan, we objectively visualize the connection between jaw and spine — radiation-free and within minutes.

klachten.label: Complaints
klachten.title: Suffering from these complaints?
klachten.description: Many chronic complaints in the head, neck, and shoulder area have a common cause: a disturbed jaw position.

howItWorks.label: Method
howItWorks.title: How does it work?
howItWorks.description: In three clear steps from complaint to solution — fully tailored to your situation.

steps.title: Free 4D Scan
steps.description: Within minutes, the DIERS scanner objectively visualizes your posture and jaw position — completely radiation-free.

steps.title: Diagnosis & Advice
steps.description: Our specialist analyzes the results and discusses a personalized treatment plan with you.

steps.title: Customized Treatment
steps.description: A phased approach from relaxation to reconstruction, tailored to the severity of your complaints.

diagnostiek.label: Diagnosis
diagnostiek.title: DIERS 4D Spinescan technology
diagnostiek.description: The DIERS 4D Spinescan is an advanced diagnostic system that analyzes the spine, posture, and movement in real-time. Without radiation or physical contact, you get immediate insight into the relationship between your jaw position and body posture.
features: Measurement takes only a few minutes

behandeling.label: Treatment
behandeling.title: From insight to recovery
behandeling.description: Our treatment approach consists of three phases. Each phase builds on the previous one and is tailored to your specific situation.

phases.title: Relaxation Splint
phases.description: The first step toward relaxation of the jaw muscles and reduction of acute complaints.

phases.title: Repositioning Splint
phases.description: Correction of jaw position for structural improvement of the jaw-spine balance.

phases.title: Reconstruction
phases.description: Definitive reconstruction of the dentition for lasting results and optimal function.

resultaten.label: Results
resultaten.title: Real results, lasting improvement
resultaten.description: Our approach delivers measurable improvement — confirmed by objective 4D measurements and the experiences of hundreds of patients.

partners.label: Collaboration
partners.title: Partnership with Balans Rugcentrum Eindhoven
paragraphs: Vincor works closely with Balans Rugcentrum Eindhoven. Together we combine expertise in occlusion and posture therapy for an integral approach to your complaints.
Our DIERS 4D Spinescan is at Balans Rugcentrum, where you can go for your free scan and personal advice session.

items.text: After years of headaches, finally a clear diagnosis. The 4D scan showed exactly what was wrong. Very happy with the result of the splint.
items.author: Mark V.

items.text: Professional and friendly team. The explanation about the relationship between my jaw and neck complaints was very enlightening. Highly recommended!
items.author: Sandra K.

items.text: The repositioning splint has changed my life. No more migraine since 4 months. Cannot recommend Vincor enough.
items.author: Peter de J.

items.text: Good experience. Scan was fast and painless. Unfortunately not everything is covered by insurance, but the costs are transparent.
items.author: Lisa M.

items.text: After years of headaches and jaw complaints, I finally gained insight into the cause. The 4D scan clearly showed how my jaw position affected my entire posture. After treatment with the repositioning splint, the headache has almost completely disappeared.
items.name: Annelies, 43

items.text: I had been suffering from neck pain and tension in my shoulders for months. My physiotherapist couldn't find the cause. At Vincor, it turned out my jaw position was the culprit. The splint treatment has improved my life enormously — I sleep better and have hardly any neck pain anymore.
items.name: Tom, 39

cta.title: Book your free 4D scan
cta.description: Experience for yourself how the DIERS 4D Spinescan brings the cause of your complaints into view — completely free of charge and radiation-free.
